title: Offline & Downloads
footer: Downloaded translations stay readable with no connection. Daily devotionals from The Gospel Coalition stream over the network and aren't stored offline.

alerts.wifiRequiredMessage: You have "Download over Wi-Fi only" turned on. Connect to Wi-Fi or turn the option off to download on cellular.
alerts.downloadFailedMessage: Could not download this translation. Check your connection and try again.
alerts.deleteMessage: Remove "{{name}}" from this device? You can download it again anytime.
